title: Finnish Working Life Barometer 1993
description: The annual survey studied employee opinion on the quality of working life in Finland. First, the respondents were asked how many years/months they had worked for the employer they were working for at the time, number of persons at the workplace, and what kind of changes there had been in staff numbers, working hours and contracts during the past 12 months, and whether people had been transferred to other units.
